PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Hines for Dianne Garcia (Petitioner).

Mr. Hines stated that Christopher Jew left his firm last week, that he did not get the Probate Examiner's notes until Thursday and that he tried to get a continuance. The Court stated that it is of the opinion that the presumption of revocation is not in play here because this is not a contested will. Mr. Hines stated that the Beneficiaries are the same in the trust as they are intestate. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for December 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
